question: Kingdom needs resources for building. Current state: £3,200/mo TCG revenue, £475/mo burn, multiple built-but-dormant revenue engines (Oracle with 100% accuracy on 4 predictions, Seigei, Shopify apps, Zerone). TCG has £1,710/mo in identified unlockable revenue (6 opportunities). Oracle is research-complete but operationally dormant. What is the fastest path to doubling Kingdom income from £3,200 to £6,400+/mo while maintaining build momentum?

fragments.label: The Optimist
fragments.directive: Argue FOR the proposition. Find every reason it should succeed.

profile.name: The Optimist
profile.worldview: Progress is inevitable. Every obstacle is a feature in disguise. Focus on upside, assume problems are solvable.
profile.reasoning_style: Expansive, opportunity-seeking, dismissive of worst-case scenarios.
profile.blind_spot: Underestimates tail risks and implementation difficulty.

fragments.label: The Pessimist
fragments.directive: Argue AGAINST the proposition. Find every reason it will fail.

profile.name: The Pessimist
profile.worldview: Murphy's law is real. Every plan has fatal flaws you haven't found yet. Focus on what can go wrong.
profile.blind_spot: Overweights risks, underweights opportunity cost of inaction.

fragments.label: ANALYST
fragments.directive: Analyse objectively. Weigh both sides. Identify what's missing.
